name: LOINC
repo_strategy: Do not mirror full release unless licence permits; store mapping code and derived non-infringing identifiers with attribution.

name: RxNorm
repo_strategy: Use RxNav APIs or RxNav-in-a-Box locally; avoid bundling licensed UMLS distributions in repo.
mapping_use: NDC/ingredient/brand/clinical drug mapping; PBS and Part B drug harmonisation.

name: UMLS Metathesaurus
repo_strategy: Connector-only / local user-supplied cache; never push UMLS source files to public repo or HF dataset.
mapping_use: Terminology bridge across ICD, CPT, SNOMED CT, RxNorm, MeSH and others where licensed.

name: ICD-10 / ICD-10-CM / ICD-10-AM
repo_strategy: Store source-specific adapters and licence metadata; do not assume one ICD variant maps cleanly to another.
mapping_use: Eligibility, indication, case-mix and hospital episode mapping.

name: ICD-11
repo_strategy: Prefer WHO API integration and pinned release metadata rather than static mirror.
mapping_use: Modern diagnosis concept spine and international classification reference.

name: WHO ATC/DDD
repo_strategy: Store mapping scripts and source URLs; check redistribution rights for annual ATC index extracts.

name: SNOMED CT
repo_strategy: Do not mirror unless national licence permits; support user-supplied RF2 bundles.
mapping_use: Clinical indication and procedure semantic mapping.

name: Human Phenotype Ontology
repo_strategy: Prefer official OBO/JSON downloads with attribution; version pin in data catalog.
mapping_use: Genomic indication and rare disease phenotype matching.

name: OMIM
repo_strategy: Do not mirror; support local licensed keys only.
mapping_use: Gene-disease validity and rare disease labels.

name: ORPHAnet / ORDO
repo_strategy: Use permitted downloads/APIs and track attribution requirements.

name: HGNC
repo_strategy: Mirror permissible gene symbol reference tables if licence confirms; preserve version.

name: Read Codes / CTV3
repo_strategy: Treat as historical/NHS-licensed; do not mirror until licence clarified.

name: DSM-5
repo_strategy: Do not mirror proprietary text; store mappings only where allowed from licensed/local sources.

name: MeSH
repo_strategy: Use NLM downloads/API with attribution and version pinning.
mapping_use: Evidence literature indexing and concept enrichment.
